declared_goal: Enhance the e-commerce platform with a customer sentiment feedback module.
declared_plan: Write a Python script to import and clean customer review data
Build a machine learning model for sentiment evaluation using an annotated dataset
Host the model on a cloud API for immediate responses
Establish logging and monitoring for model performance and user interactions
Connect the API to the established e-commerce dashboard

trajectory.thought: Writing a Python script to import and clean customer review data.

action.name: fs.write

args.content:

  return reviews

action.raw: fs.write(clean_review_data.py, review importing and cleaning script)
